title: boerhavia xanti
intro: Boerhavia xanti, also known as Mexican snake root, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Four o'clock family and is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Boerhavia xanti include its ability to help lower blood pressure, alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions, and even treat certain types of kidney stones. Herbal preparations of Boerhavia xanti can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support kidney health and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections.
